## Entities.Fillings.IFillingRecipeEntity.derivedFrom property

Optional derivation info - tracks lineage if this filling recipe was forked from another filling recipe (e.g., when editing a read-only filling recipe)

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly derivedFrom?: IFillingDerivationEntity;
```
